final:
module qam_16_modulator(  
    input [3:0] symbol,  
    output reg [1:0] I,  
    output reg [1:0] Q  
);  
  wire [3:0] _tap_symbol = symbol & {4{1'b1}};

  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (symbol)  
            4'b0000: begin I = 2'b00; Q = 2'b00; end  
            4'b0001: begin I = 2'b00; Q = 2'b01; end  
            4'b0010: begin I = 2'b00; Q = 2'b10; end  
            4'b0011: begin I = 2'b00; Q = 2'b11; end  
            4'b0100: begin I = 2'b01; Q = 2'b00; end  
            4'b0101: begin I = 2'b01; Q = 2'b01; end  
            4'b0110: begin I = 2'b01; Q = 2'b10; end  
            4'b0111: begin I = 2'b01; Q = 2'b11; end  
            4'b1000: begin I = 2'b10; Q = 2'b00; end  
            4'b1001: begin I = 2'b10; Q = 2'b01; end  
            4'b1010: begin I = 2'b10; Q = 2'b10; end  
            4'b1011: begin I = 2'b10; Q = 2'b11; end  
            4'b1100: begin I = 2'b11; Q = 2'b00; end  
            4'b1101: begin I = 2'b11; Q = 2'b01; end  
            4'b1110: begin I = 2'b11; Q = 2'b10; end  
            4'b1111: begin I = 2'b11; Q = 2'b11; end  
            default: begin I = 2'b00; Q = 2'b00; end  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
